name: integration_alternating
description: Quick integration: two short WAVs played sequentially (no overlap)

name: integration_overlapping
description: Quick integration: two short WAVs with 5s overlap

name: e2e_alternating
description: E2E quality: two long WAVs played sequentially (mic finishes before system starts)

name: e2e_overlapping
description: E2E quality: two long WAVs with significant time overlap

name: e2e_gap
description: E2E quality: 10s silence gap between mic and system audio — tests segment splitting

name: e2e_english
description: E2E quality: two pure-English WAVs, alternating — tests English-only recognition

name: e2e_mixed_lang
description: E2E quality: Chinese mic + English system — tests mixed-language recognition

name: e2e_long_overlap
description: E2E stress: two 80s+ WAVs with heavy overlap — pressure test for concurrent speech

name: e2e_short_burst
description: E2E quality: two ~32s WAVs alternating quickly — tests fast segment switching

name: e2e_english_overlap
description: E2E quality: two English WAVs overlapping — tests English concurrent speech
